answer_en:
Trochlear notch located superiorly and directed anteriorly (articulates with the trochlea of the humerus)
Radial notch located laterally (articulates with the head of the radius)

labels.note: located superiorly and directed anteriorly (articulates with the trochlea of the humerus)
located laterally (articulates with the head of the radius)
